name: SHOTON: HASHO KORYU (CRYSTAL RELEASE: TEARING CRYSTAL FALLING DRAGON)

description.value:
Type: Ninjutsu (Shoton)

Rank: 8

Chakra Cost: 7

Learn DC: 23 | Successes: 4

Perform: 11 | Perform DC: 25

Components: H, F, X

Using this technique, the user is able to create a dragon of varying size from crystal which he uses to tear his enemy apart. Depending on the dragon's size, Small, Medium or Large, the range and damage may vary greatly.

A Small dragon costs 6 points of Chakra, has a Close range (10 ft. + 5 ft./2 levels) and deals 4d6+2 points of damage to creatures in a 5-ft. square. All damages caused by a dragon of any size can be halved with a successful Reflex save.

A Medium dragon costs 10 points of Chakra, has a Medium range (20 ft. + 10 ft./2 levels) and deals 7d6+5 points of earth damage to creatures in a 10-ft. square and increases the perform requirements by 2.

A Large dragon has a Long range (30 ft. + 15 ft./2 levels) and deals 10d6+7 points of earth damage to creatures in a 15-ft. square and increases the perform requirements by 4.

Expendable Components -At least 50, 100 or 150 pounds for a Small, Medium or Large dragon respectively, source of material nearby that can be crystallized to create the dragon.

system.range: Close (10 ft. + 5 ft./2 levels) (small), Medium (medium) or Long (large)
